advert.description: Valid advert packet: type=0x01, flags=0x00, source=aabbccdd, dest=11223344, hops=2, payload='Node1' + lat/lon floats + role=repeater(0x01) + firmware 'v1.2'

flood.description: Valid flood packet: type=0x02, flags=0x00, source=deadbeef, dest=ffffffff, hops=5, payload has channel(3-byte 'gen') + message 'hello'

direct.description: Valid direct packet: type=0x03, flags=0x00, source=cafebabe, dest=12345678, hops=1, payload routeLength=0 + message 'Hi!'

trace.description: Valid trace packet: type=0x04, flags=0x00, source=a1b2c3d4, dest=e5f6a7b8, hops=3, payload direction=request(0x00) + two 4-byte prefixes

malformed.description: Too short to contain a valid header (only 5 bytes)
